race.comment: LONESOME SOUL (10) resumed with a 1L defeat at Doomben over 1350m, closing off well. Won't be bothered by this longer journey and can win with average luck in the run. WORTHY ENUFF (7) steps up to the 1625m off wins here and at Doomben last time, where he beat the above. Keeps improving and Jones replaces the 3kg apprentice. She'll give him every chance to run it out. HELLO DOLLY DIVA (9) peaks off two nose defeats at Eagle Farm, and the latest was over this journey. Still a Maiden but she sits down in the weights and also has winning claims. GO MARO (4) knuckled down strongly to get within a nose of the winner over 1600m at Eagle Farm, spiking his numbers again. Will be winding up late and has each-way claims.
